title: Dracula
author: Bram Stoker
blurb: A solicitor's clerk, a ghost ship, and a chase across Europe.

title: Tess of the d'Urbervilles
author: Thomas Hardy
blurb: One woman walking one county, renamed but barely disguised.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
blurb: A country neighbourhood, a winter in town, and one scandalous dash from Brighton.

title: David Copperfield
author: Charles Dickens
blurb: A whole life — a Suffolk churchyard, the road to Dover, and the far side of the world.

title: Bleak House
author: Charles Dickens
blurb: Fog, Chancery, and a secret that drags a great lady from a Lincolnshire seat to a pauper's grave.

title: Kidnapped
author: Robert Louis Stevenson
blurb: A Lowland lad kidnapped, wrecked off Mull, and driven the length of the Highlands in the flight in the heather.

title: Around the World in Eighty Days
author: Jules Verne
blurb: A wager at a London club, eighty days, and the whole turning world — by steamer, rail, elephant and sledge.

title: Jane Eyre
author: Charlotte Brontë
blurb: An orphan, a charity school, a governess's post at a house with a secret — and a destitute walk across the moor.
